name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \A i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = FALSE
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \A i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = FALSE
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \A i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = FALSE
          /\ \E i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = FALSE
          /\ readers' = [j \in 1..Len(readers) |-> IF j = i THEN TRUE ELSE readers[j]]
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \A i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = FALSE
          /\ \E i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = TRUE
          /\ readers' = [j \in 1..Len(readers) |-> IF j = i THEN FALSE ELSE readers[j]]
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \A i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = FALSE
          /\ \E i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = FALSE
          /\ \E i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = TRUE
          /\ readers' = [j \in 1..Len(readers) |-> IF j = i THEN FALSE ELSE readers[j]]
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \A i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = FALSE
          /\ \E i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = FALSE
          /\ \E i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = TRUE
          /\ \E i \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[i] = FALSE
          /\ readers' = [j \in 1..Len(readers) |-> IF j = i THEN TRUE ELSE readers[j]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE) : /\ chunk \in CHANNEL_CAPACITY
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, chunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
    /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunk)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

Retransmit ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(sentChunks) : /\ sentChunks[i] \in CHANNEL_CAPACITY
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, sentChunks[i])
    /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, retransmitCount[i] + 1)
    /\ channel' = Append(channel, sentChunks[i])
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

SendChunk ==
    /\ \E chunk \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE) : /\ chunk \in CHANNEL_CAPACITY
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, chunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
    /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunk)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ chunks \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ channel \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)

====
